title: Midnight Melt Delight
description: A rich and creamy vegan dessert made with midnight blueberries and a hint of magic.
instructions: In a blender, combine blueberries, coconut cream, maple syrup, and lemon juice. Blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Melt vegan chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 10-second increments.
Drizzle the melted chocolate over the cooled blueberry mixture.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until chilled and set.
